title: Collision Course
summary:
Main
For over a year now, oil analysts have been warning of a looming oil surplus with expanding oil supply far outpacing demand. The risk of a significant stock build into 2026 has been further cemented by the rapid rise in OPEC+ production quotas, alongside growth in the Americas, whilst other factors such as sanctions, the economic outlook, and the energy transition could further impact the supply/demand balance. Perhaps the most visible near-term sign of the surplus, is oil on the water.
